title: Rocker UAT landing page
text:
Objective
This is set of user acceptance tests for docker images taken from shug0131/cctu. There is also a duplicate set of images on github
These are the outputs from the github repository rocker_edit, which itself is an embellishment of rocker project.
With each version of R that is released, a corresponding image is built with a corresponding set of add-on packages harmonised to the latest date the R version was the most recent. The UAT done here runs the basic tests on the base package, recommended and add-on packages. Each version has its own subdirectory of testing with further details below.
